key_finding: ohanism quotes AT current fair value (hs_obs ≈ 0). OTM cushion = FV drift from ATM.
reward_interpretation: maximize rebate by quoting at current FV (min(p,1-p) maximized near 0.5). Strategy fully characterized: passive post-once at FV, collect rebate on fill, hold position to resolution. No explicit spread pricing above/below FV.
